mapper.select: SELECT id,task_code,verifyer,verifyer_id,verifyer_time,state,issuer,issuer_id,type as reportTypeStatus,entrust_id as entrustId FROM test_report_record WHERE id =#{id}
SELECT t2.name FROM sys_user as t1 LEFT JOIN sys_ding_user as t2 ON t1.ding_user_id = t2.userid WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT t1.price AS cost, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS requiredCompletionTime, t1.task_code AS taskCode, t2.entrust_type checkPurpose, t2.sampling_method AS samplingMethod, t2.entrustment_no AS entrustmentNo, IFNULL(CONCAT(t2.entrust_category_type,t2.entrustment_no),t2.entrustment_no) as entrustmentNostr, t1.entrustment_id AS entrustmentId, t1.seal_type AS sealType, t2.seal_type AS sealTypeTicket, t1.report_code reportCode FROM test_report_record AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info AS t2 on t2.id = t1.entrustment_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}
SELECT t2.id as id, t2.state as state FROM test_report_record AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info AS t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id WHERE t1.id = #{taskId}

SELECT t4.id as sample_id, t4.sample_name, t4.alias_name, t4.sample_code, t4.specs, t4.batch_number, t4.generation, t5.check_item_name, t7.name, CONCAT(t6.code, '《', t6.`name`, '》') standard_name, t5.times, t5.unit_price, t5.state AS state, t5.origin_url AS originUrl, t5.opinion, t5.start_time, t5.end_time, t5.check_item_id as check_item_id, t10.name AS instrumentName, t10.id FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t3.entrustment_id = t5.entrust_id AND t4.id = t5.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t6 ON t5.standard_id = t6.id LEFT JOIN test_method t7 ON t5.method_id = t7.id left join test_product_item t8 on t5.check_item_id = t8.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item_instrument_middle_rel AS t9 on t9.id_item = t5.id LEFT JOIN test_instrument as t10 on t10.id =t9.intrusment_id where t3.entrustment_id = #{id}
SELECT t2.check_item_name as checkItemName, t2.check_item_id as checkItemId FROM test_report_record as t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail as t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}

SELECT t1.price AS cost, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS requiredCompletionTime, t1.task_code AS taskCode, t2.entrust_type checkPurpose, t2.sampling_method AS samplingMethod, t2.entrustment_no AS entrustmentNo, IFNULL(CONCAT(t2.entrust_category_type,t2.entrustment_no),t2.entrustment_no) as entrustmentNostr, t1.entrustment_id AS entrustmentId, t1.entrust_id AS entrustId, t1.seal_type AS sealType, t2.seal_type AS sealTypeTicket, t1.report_code reportCode FROM test_report_record AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info AS t2 on t2.id = t1.entrust_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}
SELECT report_url FROM test_report_record WHERE id = #{reportId}
